THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERRERA, GILBERT PEARSON, STEVEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3322 16TH ST, #1, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAY-31-1994, WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO MIDNIGHT, 5-31-94. NO FURTHER STAYS ON EVICTION. EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES. PL. TO RETAIN SEC. DEP. & LAST MO. RENT. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED.
